views.markdown: A pure-software wireless CarPlay receiver for jailbroken iPads. Showcase lets a supported iPad appear as a CarPlay car, receives the encrypted H.264 screen stream, and sends touch input back to the iPhone.

- iOS 12.x rootful jailbreak
- Cellular iPad with Personal Hotspot available
- Active SIM or carrier provisioning for Personal Hotspot
- Bundled BTstack runtime files
- OpenSSL libssl3 package
Showcase takes over classic Bluetooth while it is running, then restores Apple's bluetoothd when stopped. This beta targets rootful iOS 12 while newer firmware remains untested.

- Bundles BTstack runtime files
- Bundles the BTstack launchd socket plist required for /tmp/BTstack
- Removes dependency on the old Ringwald BTstack package
- Rootful iOS 12 package
- Declares libssl3 runtime dependency
